questionHtml: The sea star also eats the sea snails. Construct a food web to show the feeding relationships between these five organisms in the ecosystem.
markschemeHtml:
Award [2] for a correct food web

Award [1] for phytoplankton, zooplankton and mussel with correct arrows

Award [1] for mussel, sea snail and sea star with correct arrows

Award [0] if arrows are in wrong direction

Accept binomial or scientific names

meta.title: The sea star also eats the sea snails. Construct a food web to show the feeding relationships between these five organisms in the ecosystem.
